goal: 固化外部 release submission 交付包

summary.title: 固化外部 release submission 交付包
summary.what: 新增 external release submission packet，记录当前 accepted MV3 artifact、SHA256、manifest 摘要、外部提交步骤和唯一 real-profile UAT 方案；同步 cutover decision packet 到 PR #8 / origin/main@ea0443f；让 release:cutover:status 的 ready nextActions 直接指向该 submission packet；同时修正 release-package-mv3 的 ZIP 生成，让同一扩展内容可复现地得到相同 SHA256。
summary.why: repo-side gate 已绿后，继续拆 backlog 会偏离浏览器插件重构完成目标。下一步需要的是可直接交给外部 store/deployment 或 UAT 的交付包，以及可复现的 artifact checksum，避免 release 边界继续停在抽象描述。
summary.user_goal: 固化外部 release submission 交付包

decisions.point: green gate 后的交付入口
decisions.chose: 新增 docs/external-release-submission-packet-2026-05-27.md 作为外部 store/deployment submission handoff
decisions.rationale: status gate 已经证明 repo-side ready，交付包比继续创建 implementation issue 更直接推进 cutover。
rejected: 继续只在 release cutover decision packet 里用一句 remaining boundary 描述外部提交

decisions.chose: release-package-mv3 复制 dist 到 staging、固定 mtime，并用 zip -X 生成 artifact
decisions.rationale: 连续打包同一内容曾产生不同 SHA；外部提交需要稳定 checksum。
rejected: 接受 zip 默认文件时间戳导致的 checksum drift

decisions.chose: 在 submission packet 中只定义一个与 release smoke 同构的 real-profile UAT 场景
decisions.rationale: 如果人类要求额外 UAT，应验证代表性 replacement loop，不应重新打开广泛 deferred scope。

review_notes: 验证通过：bun scripts/release-package-mv3.ts --output package-determinism-a.zip 与 package-determinism-b.zip 生成相同 SHA256 556cbe724265a42e31233663cc064887363045cec1ade3cdf6048ff914ddb988。

验证通过：./node_modules/.bin/biome check scripts/release-package-mv3.ts scripts/release-cutover-status.ts apps/mv3-shell/test/release-cutover-status.spec.ts docs/external-release-submission-packet-2026-05-27.md docs/release-cutover-decision-packet-2026-05-27.md。
验证通过：bun run release:acceptance，覆盖 build、真实 Chromium MV3 smoke、repo-wide check。

behavioral_changes: release-package-mv3 now normalizes packaged ZIP timestamps and excludes extra ZIP metadata for reproducible artifact SHA256.
release-cutover-status ready-state nextActions now direct agents to the external submission packet.
release docs now identify the exact external submission artifact, deterministic checksum, and one allowed real-profile UAT scenario.

api_changes.signature: bun scripts/release-package-mv3.ts artifact ZIP metadata/checksum behavior
bun run release:cutover:status ready-state nextActions text
